name: Cinematic
description: Movie-poster — dramatic light, bold display type, high-contrast palette, mystery
use_for: dramatic narrative, mystery, big-reveal videos, behind-the-scenes

accent.role: blood-orange focal accent, rim light, single key element

flux.positive_prefix: Cinematic 16:9 still frame, anamorphic lens character, high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows with single key light, color-graded teal-and-orange but desaturated, single dramatic subject, sense of mystery and weight.
flux.positive_suffix: Movie poster composition, single focal subject, depth and atmosphere, NOT busy.

always_add: single warm key light creating rim or silhouette
atmospheric haze or particulate for depth
